test.name: Write a result sidecar for a positive record search
test.description: Execute plan item pli_001 (1850 census for Patrick Flynn, Schuylkill County). The record_search fixture returns a matching household. The skill must retain the raw results: write results/<log_id>.json with the verbatim payload, set the log entry's results_ref and results_available, and write a one-line notes summary.

input.user_message: Search the 1850 census for Patrick Flynn in Schuylkill County, per plan item pli_001.

judge_context: The new log entry must carry a non-null results_ref pointing at results/<log_id>.json, and a results/<log_id>.json sidecar must be written containing the verbatim record_search response
The sidecar's returned_count must equal the number of results in its payload
results_available should reflect the upstream total-match count, and notes should be a one-line human summary of what the search returned
